title: Add a buying box to every product
hypothesis: CVR improves by converting homepage and PDP intent into a clear purchase choice. Homepage shows SHOP ORIGINAL GIN GINS and SHOP GINGER RESCUE TABLETS CTAs but no price, add-to-cart, or retailer module visible in captured buying area; purchase_model is retailer_routed.
primary_change: Add a persistent Choose how to buy box under product titles: Buy online, Find near me, Add to my ginger routine, plus retailer logos.
decision_rule: Ship if outbound retailer click rate improves without hurting product-page bounce or time-on-page.

title: Rebuild Where To Buy
hypothesis: CVR improves by recovering shoppers who click WHERE TO BUY in primary nav. Homepage nav prominently surfaces WHERE TO BUY as the explicit purchase-intent path for this retailer-routed brand.
primary_change: Replace weak Where To Buy body with ZIP/store locator, Shop online now retailer cards, product-family filters, and fallback capture.
decision_rule: Ship if outbound retailer click rate improves without hurting Where To Buy session duration.

title: Make the empty cart useful
hypothesis: High-intent sessions recover when /cart returns a branded purchase recovery page instead of an error. Automated crawl received 403 on /cart (Cloudflare); prior production audits confirm branded 404 at this URL for retailer-routed Shopify remnants.
primary_change: Replace /cart error with purchase recovery: Continue shopping, Find a store, Shop online retailers, support links.
decision_rule: Ship if /cart exit rate drops without hurting site-wide conversion.

title: Make the Products page need-first
hypothesis: CVR improves by presenting products by shopper mission before product family. Homepage testimonials reference pregnancy nausea, vertigo, motion sickness, and upset stomach — distinct jobs-to-be-done currently scattered across product names.
primary_change: Restructure Products into need-first blocks: nausea + travel, cooking, candy lovers, drinks + shots, bulk/business.
decision_rule: Ship if Products-page click-through improves without hurting PDP-to-purchase conversion.

title: Help shoppers choose by need
hypothesis: Landing-page CVR improves by routing health-intent visitors to the right product family. Homepage fan quotes explicitly mention pregnancy, vertigo, motion sickness, and digestive discomfort — need language exists but is buried in testimonials.
primary_change: Create /find-your-ginger/ with 5 prompts: nausea, travel, cooking, daily wellness, candy/snacking. Link from nav and category pages.
decision_rule: Ship if landing-page CVR improves without hurting site-wide conversion rate.

title: Turn the homepage into shopper missions
hypothesis: CVR improves by replacing broad SHOP NOW entrances with mission cards. Homepage hero alternates Ginger Rescue nausea relief and World's #1 ginger candy — two distinct buyer missions on one screen.
primary_change: Rebuild first screen after hero into four mission cards: Settle my stomach, Find ginger candy, Cook with ginger, Buy for my business.
decision_rule: Ship if homepage CTR improves without hurting downstream CVR.

title: Package a GLP-1 support routine
hypothesis: Repeat purchase rate improves by converting medication side-effect moments into a named reorder routine. Homepage positions ginger for digestive wellness and nausea — adjacent to GLP-1 nausea use case in brand content library.
primary_change: Create GLP-1 Ginger + Turmeric Daily Support Routine bundling chews, juice, and recipe instructions inside education content.
decision_rule: Ship if 30-day repeat purchase rate among GLP-1 article visitors improves without hurting first-order AOV.

title: Sell a travel nausea kit
hypothesis: AOV rises by bundling Ginger Rescue formats for travel/motion sickness. Homepage features Ginger Rescue lozenges for natural nausea relief and separate tablet/lozenge product CTAs — formats exist but are not merchandised as a kit.
primary_change: Launch Travel Stomach Rescue Kit with lozenges + tablets; promote on Ginger Rescue PDPs and travel content.
primary_kpi: AOV among Ginger Rescue PDP visitors
decision_rule: Ship if AOV rises by ≥$3 without hurting Ginger Rescue PDP conversion.

title: Build a flavor sampler pack
hypothesis: AOV rises when first-time candy shoppers can trial multiple flavors. Homepage promotes World's #1 Selling Ginger Candy and multiple GIN GINS SKUs via testimonial cards — no sampler entry point visible.
primary_change: Launch GIN GINS Flavor Tour sampler across top flavors with find-online / find-near-me choices.
decision_rule: Ship if first-time AOV rises by ≥$4 without hurting overall candy CVR.

title: Create a pregnancy nausea page
hypothesis: Landing-page CVR improves by matching morning-sickness visitors to testimonials and product choices in one destination. Homepage testimonial: Life Saver — I'm pregnant and these have been a life saver my whole pregnancy.
primary_change: Create /morning-sickness-ginger/ with testimonials, FAQs, Ginger Rescue / GIN GINS recommendations, clinician language, buy/find choices.
decision_rule: Ship if landing-page CVR exceeds average of existing health pages without compliance flags.
